artifacts.summary: Research report identifying the bug: copy_data_dirs called with target_dir instead of project_dir, causing data to be placed in .opencode/memory/ instead of .memory/
Revised research identifying TWO bugs: copy_data_dirs parameter (target_dir vs project_dir) AND manifest naming (memory vs .memory)

Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed memory extension data directory loading by changing copy_data_dirs to use project_dir (placing data at project root) and updating directory name to .memory (dot-prefixed as documented).
